scripts.dev: npm run build:core && npm run build:ui && npm run dev -w @spekjs/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @spekjs/core && npm run build -w @spekjs/ui && npm run build -w @spekjs/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w @spekjs/web
scripts.build:webview: npm run build:core && npm run build:ui && npm run build:webview -w @spekjs/web
scripts.build:demo: npm run build -w @spekjs/core && npm run build:ui && tsx scripts/build-demo.ts
scripts.build:badges: npm run build -w @spekjs/core && tsx scripts/generate-badges.ts --repo-dir . --output-dir docs/badges
scripts.build:intellij: npm run build:core && npm run build:ui && npm run build:intellij -w @spekjs/web
scripts.version: node -e "const p=require('./packages/vscode/package.json');p.version=require('./package.json').version;require('fs').writeFileSync('./packages/vscode/package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')" && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const f='./packages/intellij/gradle.properties';const c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/pluginVersion = .*/,'pluginVersion = '+v);require('fs').writeFileSync(f,c)" && git add packages/vscode/package.json packages/intellij/gradle.properties
scripts.test: npm test -w @spekjs/core && npm test -w @spekjs/ui && npm test -w @spekjs/web
